history: Assistant: Based on our prior conversation, you are **Gowshik**, a student who is actively exploring and planning to build a business specifically focused on providing sustainability services and solutions to universities.
User: ok perfect, what is esg in 10 words
Assistant: **Environmental, Social, Governance: assessing sustainability, ethics, and long-term business resilience.**
User: ok super, what is decorbanisation in 20 words
Assistant: **Systematically reducing or eliminating greenhouse gas emissions, primarily carbon dioxide, across all sectors to achieve net-zero climate goals.**
